# Projektový technologický stack a stylizace (2026-03-06 18:24Z)

_**User**_

Potřebuji, abys prošel celý tenhle projekt a podíval se, jak dělají stylizaci. Zajímá mě, jestli to stylizují pomocí nějakých knihoven, nebo čistého CSS, SCSS třeba. Také chci vědět, jestli používají React, a celkově mi řekni, jaký mají technologický stack. Prostě jako scan toho projektu, jaký mají tech stack, co používají na tu real-time synchronizaci pro ty webovky. A zároveň mi řekni, jakou real-time synchronizaci používají pro ty hry, co tam mají. Jak to dělají, jestli to je přes web socket, nebo přes co. A zároveň mi řekni právě ty styly, přes co to dělají a tak. Celkově, jak je ten projekt postavený.

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants a comprehensive overview of the project's tech stack, including:
1. Styling approach (CSS libraries, pure CSS, SCSS, etc.)
2. Frontend framework (React, etc.)
3. Overall technology stack
4. Real-time synchronization mechanism (WebSockets, etc.)
5. How games are built and synchronized
6. General project architecture

Let me explore the project thoroughly.</details></think>

rkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e8e7cbc1-2ff2-4121-bc46-bb1b59c27c0\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e8e7cbc1-2ff2-4121-bc46-bb1b59c27c0\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury/README.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Lesury 🦥\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA web-based multiplayer party game platform. Think Jackbox — one shared screen on a TV, everyone plays from their phone. No app install needed.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Games\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Game         | Players | Status             |\\\\\\\\n| ------------ | ------- | ------------------ |\\\\\\\\n| **Timeline** | 2–8     | ✅ Live            |\\\\\\\\n| **Demo**     | Any     | ✅ (dev reference) |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### How to play\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Open the game on a TV/laptop — this is the **host screen**\\\\\\\\n2. Players scan the QR code or enter the room code on their phones\\\\\\\\n3. Phones act as controllers — the TV is the source of truth\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Layer           | Technology                                       |\\\\\\\\n| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |\\\\\\\\n| Frontend        | Next.js (App Router)                             |\\\\\\\\n| Realtime server | PartyKit (Cloudflare Workers)                    |\\\\\\\\n| Game logic      | Shared TypeScript package (&#96;@lesury/game-logic&#96;) |\\\\\\\\n| Styling         | Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion                     |\\\\\\\\n| Monorepo        | Turborepo                                        |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\napps/\\\\\\\\n  web/          → Next.js app (host + player pages)\\\\\\\\n  server/       → PartyKit server (WebSocket state broadcaster)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\npackages/\\\\\\\\n  game-logic/   → All game rules, types, and state transitions\\\\\\\\n  config/       → Shared TypeScript &amp; ESLint configs\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev     # starts Next.js + PartyKit locally\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPlayer pages open on &#96;localhost:3000&#96;, server on &#96;localhost:1999&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deployment\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSee [DEPLOYMENT.md](./DEPLOYMENT.md) for the full guide.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Short version:**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Frontend (Vercel):** auto-deploys from &#96;main&#96; branch\\\\\\\\n- **Server (PartyKit):** &#96;npm run deploy&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nTests run automatically before every deployment.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Principles\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Heads-up design** — the TV is the game. The phone is just a controller.\\\\\\\\n- **Zero friction** — no login, no app install, instant join via room code.\\\\\\\\n- **Clear start and end** — games have a defined arc, no infinite loops.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## For Developers\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAgent instructions, workflows, and design specs live in &#96;.agents/&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.agents/\\\\\\\\n  AGENTS.md                     → Rules every AI agent follows\\\\\\\\n  design_guide.md               → UI/design system reference\\\\\\\\n  timeline_game_guide.md        → Timeline game complete spec\\\\\\\\n  workflows/\\\\\\\\n    after-code-change.md        → Run after every code change\\\\\\\\n    add-new-game.md             → Guide for adding a new game\\\\\\\\n  skills/\\\\\\\\n    approve-tests/              → Approval test snapshot workflow\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":95}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury/README.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Lesury 🦥\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA web-based multiplayer party game platform. Think Jackbox — one shared screen on a TV, everyone plays from their phone. No app install needed.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Games\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Game         | Players | Status             |\\\\\\\\n| ------------ | ------- | ------------------ |\\\\\\\\n| **Timeline** | 2–8     | ✅ Live            |\\\\\\\\n| **Demo**     | Any     | ✅ (dev reference) |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### How to play\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Open the game on a TV/laptop — this is the **host screen**\\\\\\\\n2. Players scan the QR code or enter the room code on their phones\\\\\\\\n3. Phones act as controllers — the TV is the source of truth\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Layer           | Technology                                       |\\\\\\\\n| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |\\\\\\\\n| Frontend        | Next.js (App Router)                             |\\\\\\\\n| Realtime server | PartyKit (Cloudflare Workers)                    |\\\\\\\\n| Game logic      | Shared TypeScript package (&#96;@lesury/game-logic&#96;) |\\\\\\\\n| Styling         | Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion                     |\\\\\\\\n| Monorepo        | Turborepo                                        |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\napps/\\\\\\\\n  web/          → Next.js app (host + player pages)\\\\\\\\n  server/       → PartyKit server (WebSocket state broadcaster)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\npackages/\\\\\\\\n  game-logic/   → All game rules, types, and state transitions\\\\\\\\n  config/       → Shared TypeScript &amp; ESLint configs\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev     # starts Next.js + PartyKit locally\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPlayer pages open on &#96;localhost:3000&#96;, server on &#96;localhost:1999&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deployment\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSee [DEPLOYMENT.md](./DEPLOYMENT.md) for the full guide.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Short version:**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Frontend (Vercel):** auto-deploys from &#96;main&#96; branch\\\\\\\\n- **Server (PartyKit):** &#96;npm run deploy&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nTests run automatically before every deployment.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Design Principles\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Heads-up design** — the TV is the game. The phone is just a controller.\\\\\\\\n- **Zero friction** — no login, no app install, instant join via room code.\\\\\\\\n- **Clear start and end** — games have a defined arc, no infinite loops.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## For Developers\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAgent instructions, workflows, and design specs live in &#96;.agents/&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.agents/\\\\\\\\n  AGENTS.md                     → Rules every AI agent follows\\\\\\\\n  design_guide.md               → UI/design system reference\\\\\\\\n  timeline_game_guide.md        → Timeline game complete spec\\\\\\\\n  workflows/\\\\\\\\n    after-code-change.md        → Run after every code change\\\\\\\\n    add-new-game.md             → Guide for adding a new game\\\\\\\\n  skills/\\\\\\\\n    approve-tests/              → Approval test snapshot a concise overview of the project:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Lesury – Project Overview\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Project structure (top 3–4 levels)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nlesury/\\\\n├── .agents/                    # AI agent instructions, workflows, skills\\\\n│   ├── workflows/\\\\n│   └── skills/\\\\n│       └── approve-tests/\\\\n├── .claude/\\\\n├── .github/\\\\n│   └── workflows/\\\\n├── .specstory/\\\\n├── apps/\\\\n│   ├── web/                    # Next.js frontend (host + player pages)\\\\n│   │   ├── app/                # App Router\\\\n│   │   │   ├── host/\\\\n│   │   │   ├── join/\\\\n│   │   │   ├── games/\\\\n│   │   │   └── components/\\\\n│   │   ├── components/\\\\n│   │   │   ├── room/\\\\n│   │   │   ├── layout/\\\\n│   │   │   └── games/\\\\n│   │   ├── hooks/\\\\n│   │   └── public/\\\\n│   └── server/                 # PartyKit WebSocket server\\\\n│       ├── public/\\\\n│       └── src/\\\\n├── packages/\\\\n│   ├── config/                 # Shared TypeScript &amp; ESLint configs\\\\n│   │   ├── typescript/\\\\n│   │   └── eslint/\\\\n│   └── game-logic/             # Shared game rules, types, state\\\\n│       ├── games/\\\\n│       └── src/\\\\n├── scripts/\\\\n├── package.json\\\\n├── turbo.json\\\\n└── README.md\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Monorepo\\\\n\\\\nYes. It’s a Turborepo monorepo with npm workspaces:\\\\n\\\\n- **Workspaces:** &#96;apps/*&#96;, &#96;packages/*&#96;\\\\n- **Orchestration:** Turborepo (&#96;turbo run dev&#96;, &#96;turbo run build&#96;, etc.)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Package manager\\\\n\\\\n**npm** (&#96;packageManager: \\\\\\\"npm@10.2.0\\\\\\\"&#96; in root &#96;package.json&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. All &#96;package.json&#96; files\\\\n\\\\n### Root &#96;/package.json&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n{\\\\n    \\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"lesury\\\\\\\",\\\\n    \\\\\\\"private\\\\\\\": true,\\\\n    \\\\\\\"workspaces\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\"apps/*\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"packages/*\\\\\\\"],\\\\n    \\\\\\\"scripts\\\\\\\": {\\\\n        \\\\\\\"dev\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run dev\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"build\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run build\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"lint\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run lint\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"clean\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run clean\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"deploy\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run deploy\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"test\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"turbo run test\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"format\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"prettier --write .\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"format:check\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"prettier --check .\\\\\\\"\\\\n    },\\\\n    \\\\\\\"devDependencies\\\\\\\": {\\\\n        \\\\\\\"@google/genai\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^1.42.0\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"@google/generative-ai\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^0.24.1\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"@types/node-fetch\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^2.6.13\\\\\\\",\\\\n \\\\\\\"ts-node\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^10.9.2\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"turbo\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^2\\\\\\\"\\\\n    },\\\\n    \\\\\\\"packageManager\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"npm@10.2.0\\\\\\\",\\\\n    \\\\\\\"build\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsc --noEmit\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"lint\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsc --noEmit\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"deploy\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"partykit deploy\\\\\\\",\\\\n \\\\\\\"dev\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"test\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"vitest run\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"test:watch\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"vitest\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"lint\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"eslint src/\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"clean\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"rm -rf dist\\\\\\\"\\\\n    },\\\\n \\\\\\\"^8\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"typescript\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^5\\\\\\\",\\\\n        \\\\\\\"vitest\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^4.0.18\\\\\\\"\\\\n    }\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;packages/config/package.json&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n{\\\\n    \\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"@lesury/config\\\\\\\",\\\\n    \\\\\\\"version\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"0.0.0\\\\\\\",\\\\n Frontend framework\\\\n\\\\n**Next.js 16** with App Router and React 19.2.3.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. Styling\\\\n\\\\n**Tailwind CSS v4** + **Framer Motion**:\\\\n\\\\n- Tailwind via &#96;@tailwindcss/postcss&#96; in &#96;postcss.config.mjs&#96;\\\\n- &#96;@import 'tailwindcss'&#96; in &#96;apps/web/app/globals.css&#96;\\\\n- No separate &#96;tailwind.config.js&#96; (Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based config)\\\\n- Custom theme in &#96;globals.css&#96; (&#96;:root&#96;, &#96;@theme inline&#96;)\\\\n- Framer Motion for animations\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. Real-time synchronization\\\\n\\\\n**PartyKit** (Cloudflare Workers) with **partysocket**:\\\\n\\\\n- PartyKit server in &#96;apps/server&#96;\\\\n- &#96;partysocket&#96; used in both web app and server\\\\n- WebSocket-based state sync between host and players\\\\n- Server in &#96;apps/server/src/server.ts&#96; handles connections and broadcasts\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. Backend framework / runtime\\\\n\\\\n**PartyKit** (Cloudflare Workers):\\\\n\\\\n- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers\\\\n- Server entry: &#96;apps/server/src/server.ts&#96;\\\\n- Config: &#96;apps/server/partykit.json&#96;\\\\n- Deployed to PartyKit Cloud\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Config files\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;turbo.json&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n{\\\\n Server implements Party.Server {\\\\\\\\n    state: ServerState;\\\\\\\\n    gameInitialized: boolean = false;\\\\\\\\n    // Maps current conn.id → canonical player id (sessionId from lobby)\\\\\\\\n    connToPlayer: Map&lt;string, string&gt; = new Map();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    constructor(readonly room: Party.Room) {\\\\\\\\n        // Initialize with room code from room.id\\\\\\\\n        this.state = {\\\\\\\\n            room: {\\\\\\\\n                roomCode: room.id.toUpperCase(),\\\\\\\\n                hostId: '',\\\\\\\\n                players: [],\\\\\\\\n                status: 'waiting',\\\\\\\\n                gameType: 'demo', // Default, will be updated\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            game: createInitialDemoState(),\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    onConnect(conn: Party.Connection, ctx: Party.ConnectionContext) {\\\\\\\\n        console.log(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;Connected: id=${conn.id} room=${this.room.id} url=${new URL(ctx.request.url).pathname}&#96;\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // First connection becomes host\\\\\\\\n        if (!this.state.room.hostId) {\\\\\\\\n            this.state.room.hostId = conn.id;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Send current state to new connection\\\\\\\\n        this.syncToConnection(conn);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    onClose(conn: Party.Connection) {\\\\\\\\n        console.log(&#96;Disconnected: id=${conn.id}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Use the canonical player id (may differ from conn.id after a projects/personal/lesury/apps/web/hooks/usePartyRoom.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport PartySocket from 'partysocket';\\\\\\\\nimport type { RoomState } from '@lesury/game-logic';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PARTYKIT_HOST = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST || 'localhost:1999';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface UsePartyRoomOptions {\\\\\\\\n    /** If true, joins as a host (no playerName sent, no sessionId). */\\\\\\\\n    asHost?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n    /** Game type to send with the host join message. */\\\\\\\\n    gameType?: string;\\\\\\\\n    /** Player name sent with the join message (required for players). */\\\\\\\\n    playerName?: string;\\\\\\\\n    /**\\\\\\\\n     * sessionStorage key prefix for persisting player identity across redirects.\\\\\\\\n     * If provided, the hook will read/write &#96;lobbyPlayerId_&lt;ROOM&gt;&#96; and\\\\\\\\n     * &#96;lobbyPlayerName_&lt;ROOM&gt;&#96; from sessionStorage.\\\\\\\\n     */\\\\\\\\n    sessionKeyPrefix?: string;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface UsePartyRoomResult&lt;TGame&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    roomState: RoomState | null;\\\\\\\\n    gameState: TGame | null;\\\\\\\\n    myPlayerId: string;\\\\\\\\n    connectionStatus: 'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected';\\\\\\\\n    socket: PartySocket | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Shared hook that handles all PartySocket boilerplate for both\\\\\\\\n * host and player pages. Replaces ~60 lines duplicated in every page.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function usePartyRoom&lt;TGame&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    roomCode: string | null,\\\\\\\\n    options: UsePartyRoomOptions = {}\\\\\\\\n): UsePartyRoomResult&lt;TGame&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const { asHost = false, gameType, playerName, sessionKeyPrefix } = options;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;TGame | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [myPlayerId, setMyPlayerId] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;\\\\\\\\n        'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'\\\\\\\\n    &gt;('connecting');\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: roomCode.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if (asHost) {\\\\\\\\n                // The host page must send a join with gameType.\\\\\\\\n                // When all connections drop during lobby→game redirect,\\\\\\\\n                // the PartyKit room resets to gameType='demo'. Without this,\\\\\\\\n                // start_game messages are silently dropped.\\\\\\\\n                conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                    JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                        type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                        playerName: 'Host',\\\\\\\\n                        ...(gameType ? { gameType } : {}),\\\\\\\\n                    })\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n                setMyPlayerId(conn.id);\\\\\\\\n            } else {\\\\\\\\n                // Resolve identity: prefer saved sessionId from lobby redirect\\\\\\\\n                const roomKey = roomCode.toUpperCase();\\\\\\\\n                const sessionId = sessionKeyPrefix\\\\\\\\n                    ? (sessionStorage.getItem(&#96;${sessionKeyPrefix}PlayerId_${roomKey}&#96;) ??\\\\\\\\n                      undefined)\\\\\\\\n                    : undefined;\\\\\\\\n                const resolvedName = sessionKeyPrefix\\\\\\\\n                    ? sessionStorage.getItem(&#96;${sessionKeyPrefix}PlayerName_${roomKey}&#96;) ||\\\\\\\\n                      playerName ||\\\\\\\\n                      'Player'\\\\\\\\n                    : playerName || 'Player';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                setMyPlayerId(sessionId || conn.id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                    JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                        type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                        playerName: resolvedName,\\\\\\\\n                        ...(sessionId ? { sessionId } : {}),\\\\\\\\n                    })\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('[usePartyRoom] Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; setConnectionStatus('disconnected'));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n        // roomCode is the only stable dep; options are read once on connect\\\\\\\\n        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return { roomState, gameState, myPlayerId, connectionStatus, socket };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":126}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury/apps/web/hooks/usePartyRoom.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport PartySocket from 'partysocket';\\\\\\\\nimport type { RoomState } from '@lesury/game-logic';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PARTYKIT_HOST = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST || 'localhost:1999';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface UsePartyRoomOptions {\\\\\\\\n    /** If true, joins as a host (no playerName sent, no sessionId). */\\\\\\\\n    asHost?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n    /** Game type to send with the host join message. */\\\\\\\\n    gameType?: string;\\\\\\\\n    /** Player name sent with the join message (required for players). */\\\\\\\\n    playerName?: string;\\\\\\\\n    /**\\\\\\\\n     * sessionStorage key prefix for persisting player identity across redirects.\\\\\\\\n     * If provided, the hook will read/write &#96;lobbyPlayerId_&lt;ROOM&gt;&#96; and\\\\\\\\n     * &#96;lobbyPlayerName_&lt;ROOM&gt;&#96; from sessionStorage.\\\\\\\\n     */\\\\\\\\n    sessionKeyPrefix?: string;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface UsePartyRoomResult&lt;TGame&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    roomState: RoomState | null;\\\\\\\\n    gameState: TGame | null;\\\\\\\\n    myPlayerId: string;\\\\\\\\n    connectionStatus: 'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected';\\\\\\\\n    socket: PartySocket | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Shared hook that handles all PartySocket boilerplate for both\\\\\\\\n * host and player pages. Replaces ~60 lines duplicated in every page.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function usePartyRoom&lt;TGame&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    roomCode: string | null,\\\\\\\\n    options: UsePartyRoomOptions = {}\\\\\\\\n): UsePartyRoomResult&lt;TGame&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const { asHost = false, gameType, playerName, sessionKeyPrefix } = options;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;TGame | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [myPlayerId, setMyPlayerId] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;\\\\\\\\n        'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'\\\\\\\\n    &gt;('connecting');\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: roomCode.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if (asHost) {\\\\\\\\n                // The host page must send a join with gameType.\\\\\\\\n                // When all connections drop during lobby→game redirect,\\\\\\\\n                // the PartyKit room resets to gameType='demo'. Without this,\\\\\\\\n                // start_game messages are silently dropped.\\\\\\\\n                conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                    JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                        type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                        playerName: 'Host',\\\\\\\\n                        ...(gameType ? { gameType } : {}),\\\\\\\\n                    })\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n                setMyPlayerId(conn.id);\\\\\\\\n            } else {\\\\\\\\n                // Resolve identity: prefer saved sessionId from lobby redirect\\\\\\\\n                const roomKey = roomCode.toUpperCase();\\\\\\\\n                const sessionId = sessionKeyPrefix\\\\\\\\n                    ? (sessionStorage.getItem(&#96;${sessionKeyPrefix}PlayerId_${roomKey}&#96;) ??\\\\\\\\n                      undefined)\\\\\\\\n                    : undefined;\\\\\\\\n                const resolvedName = sessionKeyPrefix\\\\\\\\n                    ? sessionStorage.getItem(&#96;${sessionKeyPrefix}PlayerName_${roomKey}&#96;) ||\\\\\\\\n                      playerName ||\\\\\\\\n                      'Player'\\\\\\\\n                    : playerName || 'Player';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                setMyPlayerId(sessionId || conn.id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                    JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                        type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                        playerName: resolvedName,\\\\\\\\n                        ...(sessionId ? { sessionId } : {}),\\\\\\\\n                    })\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('[usePartyRoom] Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; setConnectionStatus('disconnected'));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n        // roomCode is the only stable dep; options are read once on connect\\\\\\\\n        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return { roomState, gameState, myPlayerId, connectionStatus, socket };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":126,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4540,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/jakubstastny/Cursor Set(this.state.room.players.map((p) =&gt; p.avatar));\\\\\\\\n        const avatar = AVATAR_POOL.find((a) =&gt; !usedAvatars.has(a)) || '👤';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const player: Player = {\\\\\\\\n            id: playerId,\\\\\\\\n            name,\\\\\\\\n            isHost: playerId === this.state.room.hostId,\\\\\\\\n            joinedAt: Date.now(),\\\\\\\\n            avatar,\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        this.state.room.players.push(player);\\\\\\\\n        this.broadcastState();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    removePlayer(connId: string) {\\\\\\\\n        const playerId = this.connToPlayer.get(connId) || connId;\\\\\\\\n        this.state.room.players = this.state.room.players.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== playerId);\\\\\\\\n        this.broadcastState();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Demo game message handling\\\\\\\\n    isDemoMessage(msg: any): msg is DemoGameMessage {\\\\\\\\n        return ['increment', 'decrement'].includes(msg.type);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    handleDemoMessage(msg: DemoGameMessage) {\\\\\\\\n        if (this.state.room.status !== 'playing') return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        this.state.game = applyDemoMessage(this.state.game as DemoGameState, msg);\\\\\\\\n        this.broadcastState();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // The Line game message handling\\\\\\\\n    isTheLineMessage(msg: any): msg is TheLineMessage {\\\\\\\\n        return ['start_game', 'move_cursor', 'place_card', 'next_turn', 'play_again'].includes(\\\\\\\\n            msg.type\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    handleTheLineMessage(msg: TheLineMessage, sender: Party.Connection) {\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n            let gameState = this.state.game as TheLineGameState;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if (msg.type === 'start_game') {\\\\\\\\n                // Create initial state with all non-host player IDs\\\\\\\\n                const playerIds = this.state.room.players.filter((p) =&gt; !p.isHost).map((p) =&gt; p.id);\\\\\\\\n                console.log(\\\\\\\\n                    &#96;[start_game] players=${JSON.stringify(this.state.room.players.map((p) =&gt; ({ id: p.id, name: p.name, isHost: p.isHost })))}, playerIds=${JSON.stringify(playerIds)}, category=${msg.category}, roundLimit=${msg.roundLimit}&#96;\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n                // Pass session's used card IDs for no-repeat draw\\\\\\\\n                const previouslyUsedCardIds = gameState.usedCardIds || [];\\\\\\\\n                gameState = createInitialTheLineState(\\\\\\\\n                    msg.category,\\\\\\\\n                    msg.roundLimit,\\\\\\\\n                    playerIds,\\\\\\\\n                    previouslyUsedCardIds\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n                this.state.room.status = 'playing';\\\\\\\\n                console.log(\\\\\\\\n                    &#96;[start_game] Game started! status=${gameState.status}, line=${gameState.line.length}, deck=${gameState.deck.length}&#96;\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n            } else if (msg.type === 'play_again') {\\\\\\\\n                gameState = applyTheLineMessage(gameState, msg);\\\\\\\\n                // Return to lobby/setup state\\\\\\\\n                this.state.room.status = 'playing';\\\\\\\\n            } else {\\\\\\\\n                gameState = applyTheLineMessage(gameState, msg);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            this.state.game = gameState;\\\\\\\\n            this.broadcastState();\\\\\\\\n        } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n            console.error('[handleTheLineMessage] ERROR:', e);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n exts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-06T18:54:09.422Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"be0ac9f8-b23e-4eaf-9e43-bb04aae3565f\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"e826eb56-4873-42a3-9fb7-1195d565ee08\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-06T18:54:09.422Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\nHere’s a concise report of the findings:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Project Analysis: Lesury\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Styling Approach\\\\n\\\\n### CSS files\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/app/globals.css&#96;** – Main app styles, imports Tailwind\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/src/styles.css&#96;** – Server styles\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/public/normalize.css&#96;** – Normalize.css\\\\n\\\\n### Tailwind CSS\\\\n- **Tailwind v4** via &#96;@tailwindcss/postcss&#96; and &#96;tailwindcss&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/app/globals.css&#96;**:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;css\\\\n  @import 'tailwindcss';\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/postcss.config.mjs&#96;**:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\\\\n  '@tailwindcss/postcss': {}\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/package.json&#96;**:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n  \\\\\\\"@tailwindcss/postcss\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^4\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"tailwindcss\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"^4\\\\\\\"\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Design tokens (globals.css)\\\\n- &#96;--background: #faf9f5&#96;\\\\n- &#96;--background-secondary: #f0efea&#96;\\\\n- &#96;--background-tertiary: #e8e6dc&#96;\\\\n- &#96;--foreground: #141413&#96;\\\\n- &#96;--foreground-secondary: #b0aea5&#96;\\\\n- &#96;--accent: #d97757&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Tailwind usage\\\\nComponents use Tailwind utility classes, e.g.:\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/components/games/the-line/TheLinePlayer.tsx&#96;**:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\\\\n  className=\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-6\\\\\\\"\\\\n  className=\\\\\\\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#141413] mb-2\\\\\\\"\\\\n  className=\\\\\\\"w-full bg-[#141413] text-white px-6 py-4 rounded-xl font-bold\\\\\\\"\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/app/components/Button.tsx&#96;**:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\\\\n  const baseStyles = 'inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg transition-all duration-200 active:scale-[0.98]';\\\\n  const variantStyles = {\\\\n      primary: 'bg-[#141413] text-[#FAF9F5] shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:bg-opacity-90',\\\\n      secondary: 'bg-[#F0EFEA] text-[#141413] border-2 border-[#E8E6DC] hover:border-[#141413]',\\\\n      outline: 'border-2 border-[#141413] text-[#141413] hover:bg-[#F0EFEA]',\\\\n  };\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Other styling\\\\n- No &#96;.scss&#96;, &#96;.less&#96;, or &#96;.styled.ts&#96; files\\\\n- No styled-components or Emotion imports in app code\\\\n- &#96;@emotion/is-prop-valid&#96; appears only in &#96;package-lock.json&#96; (likely transitive)\\\\n- No CSS-in-JS usage\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Real-time Synchronization\\\\n\\\\n### PartyKit + PartySocket\\\\n- **PartyKit** is the real-time backend (Cloudflare Workers)\\\\n- **PartySocket** is the WebSocket client\\\\n\\\\n### Server\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/&#96;** – PartyKit server\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/src/server.ts&#96;** – Handles WebSocket connections and broadcasts state\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/README.md&#96;**:\\\\n  &gt; \\\\\\\"This is a Partykit project, which lets you create real-time collaborative applications with minimal coding effort.\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n### Client connection\\\\n- **&#96;apps/web/hooks/usePartyRoom.ts&#96;** – Shared hook for PartySocket:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\\\\n  const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\n      host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\n      room: roomCode.toLowerCase(),\\\\n  });\\\\n  conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\n      const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\n      if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\n          setRoomState(data.room);\\\\n          setGameState(data.game);\\\\n      }\\\\n  });\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/src/client.ts&#96;**:\\\\n  &gt; \\\\\\\"A PartySocket is like a WebSocket, except it's a bit more magical.\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n### Sync flow\\\\n- Server sends &#96;{ type: 'sync', room, game }&#96; to clients\\\\n- &#96;syncToConnection(conn)&#96; – send state to a single connection\\\\n- &#96;broadcastState()&#96; – broadcast to all connections\\\\n- Clients update React state from these messages\\\\n\\\\n### Socket usage\\\\n- **&#96;(window as any).__partySocket&#96;** – global socket for child components\\\\n- **&#96;RoomHost.tsx&#96;**, **&#96;RoomPlayer.tsx&#96;** – create the socket and set &#96;window.__partySocket&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;usePartyRoom.ts&#96;** – same pattern for host/player pages\\\\n- Game components send messages via:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\\\\n  (window as any).__partySocket?.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'guess', word: guess }));\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Dependencies\\\\n- **&#96;partysocket&#96;** in &#96;apps/web/package.json&#96; and &#96;apps/server/package.json&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Game-related Code\\\\n\\\\n### Game logic package\\\\n- **&#96;packages/game-logic/&#96;** – shared TypeScript package (&#96;@lesury/game-logic&#96;)\\\\n- Pure logic, no framework dependencies\\\\n\\\\n### Games\\\\n| Game      | Types/Logic Path                                      |\\\\n|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------|\\\\n| Demo      | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/demo/&#96;                  |\\\\n| The Line  | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/the-line/&#96;              |\\\\n| Timeline  | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/timeline/&#96;              |\\\\n| Guessio   | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/guessio/&#96;               |\\\\n| Mindshot  | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/mindshot/&#96;              |\\\\n| Zoom      | &#96;packages/game-logic/src/games/zoom/&#96;                  |\\\\n\\\\n### Message pattern\\\\nEach game defines:\\\\n- &#96;createInitial*State()&#96; – initial state\\\\n- &#96;apply*Message(state, msg)&#96; – pure state transitions\\\\n- Message types, e.g. &#96;start_game&#96;, &#96;move_cursor&#96;, &#96;place_card&#96;, &#96;guess&#96;, etc.\\\\n\\\\n### Server routing\\\\n- **&#96;apps/server/src/server.ts&#96;** imports all game logic and routes by &#96;gameType&#96;:\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;ts\\\\n  if (msg.gameType === 'the-line') { ... }\\\\n  else if (msg.gameType === 'guessio') { ... }\\\\n  else if (msg.gameType === 'mindshot') { ... }\\\\n  else if (msg.gameType === 'zoom') { ... }\\\\n  else { this.state.game = createInitialDemoState(); }\\\\n  &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n- Server receives messages → calls &#96;apply*Message()&#96; → broadcasts new state\\\\n\\\\n### Client–server flow\\\\n1. Host/player connects via &#96;usePartyRoom&#96; or &#96;RoomHost&#96;/&#96;RoomPlayer&#96;\\\\n2. Client sends JSON messages: &#96;socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: '...', ... }))&#96;\\\\n3. Server parses, applies via game-logic, updates &#96;this.state.game&#96;\\\\n4. Server broadcasts &#96;{ type: 'sync', room, game }&#96;\\\\n5. Clients receive and update &#96;roomState&#96; / &#96;gameState&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Room types\\\\n- **&#96;packages/game-logic/src/room/types.ts&#96;** – &#96;RoomState&#96;, &#96;Player&#96;, &#96;RoomMessage&#96;\\\\n- Room messages: &#96;join&#96;, &#96;leave&#96;, &#96;start&#96;, &#96;sync&#96;, &#96;kick&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### UI components\\\\n- **Host**: &#96;*Host.tsx&#96; (e.g. &#96;TheLineHost&#96;, &#96;ZoomHost&#96;, &#96;MindshotHost&#96;)\\\\n- **Player**: &#96;*Player.tsx&#96; (e.g. &#96;TheLinePlayer&#96;, &#96;ZoomPlayer&#96;, &#96;MindshotPlayer&#96;)\\\\n- Host shows shared screen; players use phones and send actions via the socket\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\n| Area              | Approach                                                                 |\\\\n|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|\\\\n| Styling           | Tailwind v4 + global CSS variables, no CSS-in-JS                         |\\\\n| Real-time         | PartyKit (WebSocket) + PartySocket, sync via &#96;{ type: 'sync', room, game }&#96; |\\\\n| Game logic        | Pure functions in &#96;packages/game-logic&#96;, server applies and broadcasts   |\\\\n| Client–server     | JSON messages over WebSocket, state broadcast to all clients              |\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772821537926,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Project <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me synthesize this into a clear overview for the user in Czech.</details></think>

---

Tady je kompletní přehled tech stacku projektu **Lesury**:

---

## Co to je

Lesury je webová **multiplayer party game platforma** ve stylu Jackbox. Jeden sdílený displej (TV/laptop) funguje jako host a hráči se připojují přes telefon pomocí QR kódu nebo kódu místnosti.

---

## Architektura projektu

**Turborepo monorepo** s npm workspaces, rozdělené na:

| Workspace | Popis |
|---|---|
| `apps/web` | Next.js frontend (host + player stránky) |
| `apps/server` | PartyKit WebSocket server |
| `packages/game-logic` | Sdílená herní logika (čisté funkce, bez frameworku) |
| `packages/config` | Sdílené TypeScript a ESLint konfigurace |

---

## Frontend

- **React 19.2** s **Next.js 16** (App Router + Turbopack pro dev)
- **Framer Motion** pro animace
- Build tool: Next.js interně (Turbopack v dev, webpack v buildu)
- Balíčkovač: **tsup** pro `game-logic` package
- Testy: **Vitest** v `game-logic`

---

## Stylizace

**Tailwind CSS v4** -- čistě utilitní třídy, žádné CSS-in-JS, žádné SCSS, žádné styled-components.

Konfigurace je přes CSS (Tailwind v4 způsob) v `apps/web/app/globals.css`:

- `@import 'tailwindcss'` jako základ
- Vlastní design tokeny přes CSS custom properties (`:root` + `@theme inline`)
- Barevná paleta: teplé neutrální tóny (`#faf9f5` pozadí, `#141413` text, `#d97757` accent)
- PostCSS plugin `@tailwindcss/postcss`

Komponenty používají přímo Tailwind utility třídy v JSX:

```tsx
className="min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-6"
```

---

## Real-time synchronizace

**PartyKit** + **PartySocket** -- tedy **WebSockety** na Cloudflare Workers.

Jak to funguje:

1. **Klient** (host/hráč) se připojí přes `PartySocket` (wrapper nad WebSocket) k PartyKit serveru
2. Klient posílá **JSON zprávy** přes WebSocket: `socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'guess', word: '...' }))`
3. **Server** (`apps/server/src/server.ts`) přijme zprávu, zavolá příslušnou pure funkci z `@lesury/game-logic` (např. `applyTheLineMessage(state, msg)`)
4. Server aktualizuje stav a **broadcastuje** všem klientům: `{ type: 'sync', room, game }`
5. Klienti přijmou sync zprávu a aktualizují React stav

Na klientu se připojení řeší přes custom hook `usePartyRoom.ts`, který vytvoří `PartySocket` instanci a naslouchá na `sync` zprávy.

---

## Herní logika

Každá hra v `packages/game-logic/src/games/` má:

- **Typy** (stavy, zprávy)
- `createInitial*State()` -- vytvoření počátečního stavu
- `apply*Message(state, msg)` -- čistá funkce pro přechody stavů

Aktuálně implementované hry: **Timeline**, **The Line**, **Guessio**, **Mindshot**, **Zoom**, **Demo**

Server routuje zprávy podle `gameType` a volá odpovídající `apply*Message`.

---

## Deployment

- **Frontend**: Vercel (Next.js)
- **Server**: PartyKit Cloud (Cloudflare Workers)

---

## Shrnutí tech stacku

| Oblast | Technologie |
|---|---|
| Monorepo | Turborepo + npm workspaces |
| Frontend framework | React 19 + Next.js 16 (App Router) |
| Stylizace | Tailwind CSS v4 (utility classes) |
| Animace | Framer Motion |
| Real-time | PartyKit (WebSocket na Cloudflare Workers) |
| Klient socket | PartySocket |
| Herní logika | Čistý TypeScript (pure functions), sdílený package |
| Build (game-logic) | tsup |
| Testy | Vitest |
| Linting | ESLint (next config) |
| Formátování | Prettier |
| Deploy frontend | Vercel |
| Deploy server | PartyKit Cloud |
| Package manager | npm 10.2 |
| TypeScript | v5 |

---

_**User**_

Jak těžké by bylo celý ten projekt předělat na to, aby používal ShadCN komponenty? A je to vůbec možné? Já chci, aby to bylo jednodušší v budoucnu stylizovat. Ale nevím, jestli to je možné, nebo jak to, jestli to už není možné v téhle fázi projektu. Řekni mi, jestli jsou tu nějaké způsoby, jak toho dosáhnout, abychom to celé převedli na ShadCN. A měli jsme to nějak unifikované, a mohli jsme jenom potom třeba i TweakCN nainstalovat a upravovat ten styl přes TweakCN, a dosáhnout tak nějaké jako jednotné vizualizace hezké a konzistentní. A zároveň mi řekni, jak ten TweakCN přesně funguje. Jestli je to kompatibilní s Tailwindem, jestli je lepší používat jenom ShadCN a Tailwind, nebo ShadCN a Tailwind a TweakCN. Celkově mi řekni, jak na to.

---

projects/personal/lesury/apps/web/components/room/RoomHost.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useState, useRef, ReactNode } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\\\\\\\\nimport PartySocket from 'partysocket';\\\\\\\\nimport QRCode from 'qrcode';\\\\\\\\nimport { RoomState, generateRoomCode, generateRoomUrl } from '@lesury/game-logic';\\\\\\\\nimport Button from '@/app/components/Button';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PARTYKIT_HOST = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST || 'localhost:1999';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface RoomHostProps {\\\\\\\\n    gameType: string;\\\\\\\\n    children: (state: { room: RoomState; game: any }) =&gt; ReactNode;\\\\\\\\n    onGameStart?: (roomState: RoomState) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function RoomHost({ gameType, children, onGameStart }: RoomHostProps) {\\\\\\\\n    const router = useRouter();\\\\\\\\n    const [roomCode, setRoomCode] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n    const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;any&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;\\\\\\\\n        'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'\\\\\\\\n    &gt;('connecting');\\\\\\\\n    const canvasRef = useRef&lt;HTMLCanvasElement&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Create room and connect on mount\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const code = generateRoomCode();\\\\\\\\n        setRoomCode(code);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Connect to PartyKit\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: code.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('Connected to PartyKit as host!');\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            // Join as host and specify game type\\\\\\\\n            conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                    type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                    playerName: 'Host',\\\\\\\\n                    gameType: gameType,\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            );\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('disconnected');\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        // Make socket available globally for child components\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n    }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const generateQR = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!canvasRef.current || !roomCode) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const baseUrl = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.location.origin : '';\\\\\\\\n        const url = generateRoomUrl(gameType, roomCode, baseUrl);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        console.log('QR: Generating code for URL:', url);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        QRCode.toCanvas(\\\\\\\\n            canvasRef.current,\\\\\\\\n            url,\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                width: 300,\\\\\\\\n                margin: 2,\\\\\\\\n                color: {\\\\\\\\n                    dark: '#141413',\\\\\\\\n                    light: '#FAF9F5',\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            (error) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                if (error) {\\\\\\\\n                    console.error('QR code generation failed:', error);\\\\\\\\n                } else {\\\\\\\\n                    console.log('QR code generated successfully');\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setQrCodeUrl(url);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Generate QR code\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('QR: No room code yet');\\\\\\\\n            return;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if (!canvasRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('QR: Canvas ref not ready');\\\\\\\\n            // Retry after a short delay to wait for canvas to mount\\\\\\\\n            const timer = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                if (canvasRef.current &amp;&amp; roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n                    generateQR();\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            }, 100);\\\\\\\\n            return () =&gt; clearTimeout(timer);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        generateQR();\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode, gameType, roomState]); // Add roomState to re-trigger when canvas appears\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleStart = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (socket &amp;&amp; roomState) {\\\\\\\\n            socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'start' }));\\\\\\\\n            // Call callback if provided (for redirects)\\\\\\\\n            if (onGameStart) {\\\\\\\\n                onGameStart(roomState);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const copyRoomCode = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        navigator.clipboard.writeText(roomCode);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const copyRoomLink = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (qrCodeUrl) {\\\\\\\\n            navigator.clipboard.writeText(qrCodeUrl);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Show loading until connected with room  state\\\\\\\\n    if (!roomState || !gameState) {\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-[#E8E6DC] max-w-2xl w-full\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-center\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"animate-spin w-8 h-8 border-2 border-[#E8E6DC] border-t-[#141413] rounded-full mx-auto mb-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-[#B0AEA5]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Setting up room...&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If game is playing, show game component\\\\\\\\n    if (roomState.status === 'playing') {\\\\\\\\n        return &lt;&gt;{children({ room: roomState, game: gameState })}&lt;/&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Waiting room (show QR, player list, start button)\\\\\\\\n    return (\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w-full max-w-2xl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                {/* Back Button */}\\\\\\\\n                &lt;button\\\\\\\\n                    onClick={() =&gt; (window.location.href = &#96;/games/${gameType}&#96;)}\\\\\\\\n                    className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-[#B0AEA5] hover:text-[#141413] flex items-center gap-2 mb-4 transition-colors\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                &gt;\\\\\\\\n                    ← Back\\\\\\\\n                &lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-[#E8E6DC]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;h1 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Waiting for Players&lt;/h1&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    {/* QR Code */}\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-[#F0EFEA] rounded-2xl p-6 mb-6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-sm text-[#B0AEA5] text-center mb-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                            Scan to join on 'qrcode';\\\\\\\\nimport { RoomState, generateRoomCode, generateRoomUrl } from '@lesury/game-logic';\\\\\\\\nimport Button from '@/app/components/Button';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PARTYKIT_HOST = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST || 'localhost:1999';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface RoomHostProps {\\\\\\\\n    gameType: string;\\\\\\\\n    children: (state: { room: RoomState; game: any }) =&gt; ReactNode;\\\\\\\\n    onGameStart?: (roomState: RoomState) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function RoomHost({ gameType, children, onGameStart }: RoomHostProps) {\\\\\\\\n    const router = useRouter();\\\\\\\\n    const [roomCode, setRoomCode] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n    const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;any&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;\\\\\\\\n        'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'\\\\\\\\n    &gt;('connecting');\\\\\\\\n    const canvasRef = useRef&lt;HTMLCanvasElement&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Create room and connect on mount\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const code = generateRoomCode();\\\\\\\\n        setRoomCode(code);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Connect to PartyKit\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: code.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('Connected to PartyKit as host!');\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            // Join as host and specify game type\\\\\\\\n            conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                    type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                    playerName: 'Host',\\\\\\\\n                    gameType: gameType,\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            );\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('disconnected');\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        // Make socket available globally for child components\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n    }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const generateQR = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!canvasRef.current || !roomCode) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const baseUrl = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.location.origin : '';\\\\\\\\n        const url = generateRoomUrl(gameType, roomCode, baseUrl);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        console.log('QR: Generating code for URL:', url);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        QRCode.toCanvas(\\\\\\\\n            canvasRef.current,\\\\\\\\n            url,\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                width: 300,\\\\\\\\n                margin: 2,\\\\\\\\n                color: {\\\\\\\\n                    dark: '#141413',\\\\\\\\n                    light: '#FAF9F5',\\\\\\\\n                },\\\\\\\\n            },\\\\\\\\n            (error) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                if (error) {\\\\\\\\n                    console.error('QR code generation failed:', error);\\\\\\\\n                } else {\\\\\\\\n                    console.log('QR code generated successfully');\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setQrCodeUrl(url);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Generate QR code\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('QR: No room code yet');\\\\\\\\n            return;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if (!canvasRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('QR: Canvas ref not ready');\\\\\\\\n            // Retry after a short delay to wait for canvas to mount\\\\\\\\n            const timer = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                if (canvasRef.current &amp;&amp; roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n                    generateQR();\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            }, 100);\\\\\\\\n            return () =&gt; clearTimeout(timer);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        generateQR();\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode, gameType, roomState]); // Add roomState to re-trigger when canvas appears\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleStart = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (socket &amp;&amp; roomState) {\\\\\\\\n            socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'start' }));\\\\\\\\n            // Call callback if provided (for redirects)\\\\\\\\n            if (onGameStart) {\\\\\\\\n                onGameStart(roomState);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const copyRoomCode = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        navigator.clipboard.writeText(roomCode);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const copyRoomLink = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (qrCodeUrl) {\\\\\\\\n            navigator.clipboard.writeText(qrCodeUrl);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Show loading until connected with room  state\\\\\\\\n    if (!roomState || !gameState) {\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-[#E8E6DC] max-w-2xl w-full\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-center\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"animate-spin w-8 h-8 border-2 border-[#E8E6DC] border-t-[#141413] rounded-full mx-auto mb-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-[#B0AEA5]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Setting up room...&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If game is playing, show game component\\\\\\\\n    if (roomState.status === 'playing') {\\\\\\\\n        return &lt;&gt;{children({ room: roomState, game: gameState })}&lt;/&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Waiting room (show QR, player list, start button)\\\\\\\\n    return (\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w-full max-w-2xl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                {/* Back Button */}\\\\\\\\n                &lt;button\\\\\\\\n                    onClick={() =&gt; projects/personal/lesury/apps/web/components/room/RoomPlayer.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useState, ReactNode } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';\\\\\\\\nimport PartySocket from 'partysocket';\\\\\\\\nimport { RoomState, validateRoomCode } from '@lesury/game-logic';\\\\\\\\nimport Button from '@/app/components/Button';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PARTYKIT_HOST = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST || 'localhost:1999';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface RoomPlayerProps {\\\\\\\\n    gameType: string; // Can be 'unknown' if joining without selecting game\\\\\\\\n    children: (state: { room: RoomState; game: any; myPlayerId: string }) =&gt; ReactNode;\\\\\\\\n    onGameStart?: (roomState: RoomState) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function RoomPlayer({ gameType, children, onGameStart }: RoomPlayerProps) {\\\\\\\\n    const router = useRouter();\\\\\\\\n    const searchParams = useSearchParams();\\\\\\\\n    const roomFromUrl = searchParams.get('room');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [mode, setMode] = useState&lt;'input' | 'connected'&gt;('input');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomCode, setRoomCode] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [inputCode, setInputCode] = useState(roomFromUrl || '');\\\\\\\\n    const [playerName, setPlayerName] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;any&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [myPlayerId, setMyPlayerId] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Connect to room when roomCode is set\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode || !playerName) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: roomCode.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('Connected to room!');\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n            // Capture our own socket ID — this is what the server uses as player.id\\\\\\\\n            setMyPlayerId(conn.id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            // Join as player\\\\\\\\n            conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                    type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                    playerName: playerName || 'Player',\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            );\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('disconnected');\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        setMode('connected');\\\\\\\\n        // Make socket available globally for child components\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode, playerName]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Detect game start and trigger callback\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (roomState?.status === 'playing' &amp;&amp; onGameStart) {\\\\\\\\n            // Save our lobby socket ID to sessionStorage so the game page\\\\\\\\n            // can use the same player identity after the redirect creates a new socket.\\\\\\\\n            if (myPlayerId &amp;&amp; roomState.roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n                sessionStorage.setItem(&#96;lobbyPlayerId_${roomState.roomCode}&#96;, myPlayerId);\\\\\\\\n                sessionStorage.setItem(&#96;lobbyPlayerName_${roomState.roomCode}&#96;, playerName);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n            onGameStart(roomState);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomState?.status, onGameStart, roomState, myPlayerId]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleJoinManually = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (validateRoomCode(inputCode) &amp;&amp; playerName.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n            const upperCode = inputCode.toUpperCase();\\\\\\\\n            setRoomCode(upperCode);\\\\\\\\n            // Update URL to include room param\\\\\\\\n            const newUrl = &#96;/join?room=${upperCode}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n            window.history.pushState({}, '', newUrl);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If game is playing, show game component\\\\\\\\n    if (roomState?.status === 'playing' &amp;&amp; gameState &amp;&amp; roomState) {\\\\\\\\n        return &lt;&gt;{children({ room: roomState, game: gameState, myPlayerId })}&lt;/&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Input/Scan mode\\\\\\\\n    if (mode === 'input') {\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-[#E8E6DC] max-w-md w-full\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;h1 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Join Game&lt;/h1&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    {/* Player Name */}\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div // Can be 'unknown' if joining without selecting game\\\\\\\\n    children: (state: { room: RoomState; game: any; myPlayerId: string }) =&gt; ReactNode;\\\\\\\\n    onGameStart?: (roomState: RoomState) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function RoomPlayer({ gameType, children, onGameStart }: RoomPlayerProps) {\\\\\\\\n    const router = useRouter();\\\\\\\\n    const searchParams = useSearchParams();\\\\\\\\n    const roomFromUrl = searchParams.get('room');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [mode, setMode] = useState&lt;'input' | 'connected'&gt;('input');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomCode, setRoomCode] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [inputCode, setInputCode] = useState(roomFromUrl || '');\\\\\\\\n    const [playerName, setPlayerName] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [roomState, setRoomState] = useState&lt;RoomState | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [gameState, setGameState] = useState&lt;any&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [socket, setSocket] = useState&lt;PartySocket | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n    const [myPlayerId, setMyPlayerId] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n    const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState&lt;string&gt;('');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Connect to room when roomCode is set\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!roomCode || !playerName) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const conn = new PartySocket({\\\\\\\\n            host: PARTYKIT_HOST,\\\\\\\\n            room: roomCode.toLowerCase(),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('open', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('Connected to room!');\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n            // Capture our own socket ID — this is what the server uses as player.id\\\\\\\\n            setMyPlayerId(conn.id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            // Join as player\\\\\\\\n            conn.send(\\\\\\\\n                JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n                    type: 'join',\\\\\\\\n                    playerName: playerName || 'Player',\\\\\\\\n                })\\\\\\\\n            );\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('message', (evt) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n                const data = JSON.parse(evt.data as string);\\\\\\\\n                if (data.type === 'sync') {\\\\\\\\n                    setRoomState(data.room);\\\\\\\\n                    setGameState(data.game);\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n                console.error('Failed to parse message:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        conn.addEventListener('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            setConnectionStatus('disconnected');\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        setSocket(conn);\\\\\\\\n        setMode('connected');\\\\\\\\n        // Make socket available globally for child components\\\\\\\\n        (window as any).__partySocket = conn;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            conn.close();\\\\\\\\n            delete (window as any).__partySocket;\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomCode, playerName]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Detect game start and trigger callback\\\\\\\\n    useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (roomState?.status === 'playing' &amp;&amp; onGameStart) {\\\\\\\\n            // Save our lobby socket ID to sessionStorage so the game page\\\\\\\\n            // can use the same player identity after the redirect creates a new socket.\\\\\\\\n            if (myPlayerId &amp;&amp; roomState.roomCode) {\\\\\\\\n                sessionStorage.setItem(&#96;lobbyPlayerId_${roomState.roomCode}&#96;, myPlayerId);\\\\\\\\n                sessionStorage.setItem(&#96;lobbyPlayerName_${roomState.roomCode}&#96;, playerName);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n            onGameStart(roomState);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }, [roomState?.status, onGameStart, roomState, myPlayerId]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleJoinManually = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (validateRoomCode(inputCode) &amp;&amp; playerName.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n            const upperCode = inputCode.toUpperCase();\\\\\\\\n            setRoomCode(upperCode);\\\\\\\\n            // Update URL to include room param\\\\\\\\n            const newUrl = &#96;/join?room=${upperCode}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n            window.history.pushState({}, '', newUrl);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If game is playing, show game component\\\\\\\\n    if (roomState?.status === 'playing' &amp;&amp; gameState &amp;&amp; roomState) {\\\\\\\\n        return &lt;&gt;{children({ room: roomState, game: gameState, myPlayerId })}&lt;/&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Input/Scan mode\\\\\\\\n    if (mode === 'input') {\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"min-h-screen bg-[#FAF9F5] flex items-center justify-center p-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-[#E8E6DC] max-w-md w-full\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;h1 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Join Game&lt;/h1&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    {/* Player Name */}\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mb-4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;label className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Your Name&lt;/label&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;input\\\\\\\\n                            type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                            value={playerName}\\\\\\\\n                            onChange={(e) =&gt; setPlayerName(e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n                            placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Enter your name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                            maxLength={20}\\\\\\\\n                            className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w-full bg-[#F0EFEA] text-[#141413] px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[#E8E6DC] focus:border-[#D97757] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757]/20\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        /&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    {/* Room Code */}\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mb-6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;label className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;Room Code&lt;/label&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        &lt;input\\\\\\\\n                            type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                            value={inputCode}\\\\\\\\n                            onChange={(e) =&gt;
